focusLineHtml: Process thinking · data visualization · human-reviewed AI workflows

supporting.heading: Supporting infrastructure
supporting.sub:
The systems the
projects above stand on

cards.title: Debug Memory Infrastructure
cards.body: Structured note format for recording bugs, lessons and what to avoid next time. Dry-run by default; nothing writes without confirmation.

cards.title: Auto-Typesetting Cover Tool
cards.body: React + Vite tool that turns raw text into poster / cover layouts and exports PNG, SVG and JSON.

cards.title: Finance-style Exception Review
cards.body: Mock invoice / PO / payment dataset testing source → classify → human-review logic. 8 mock invoices, 6 exception types, 0 auto-resolved.

footer.left: Erin · figures taken from project logs, databases and local files · 2026-07-20
footer.right: Code walkthroughs & live demos available on request
